title: dupatya selaginoides
intro: Dupatya selaginoides, also known as Dusky craspedia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dupatya selaginoides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
